mapper.select: SELECT id, username, display_name, status FROM sys_user ORDER BY id ASC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, sort_order FROM sys_role ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, permission_code, permission_name, module FROM sys_permission ORDER BY module ASC, permission_code ASC
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY role_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
